title: globularia nana subsp. bellidifolia
intro: Globularia nana subsp. bellidifolia, commonly known as the dwarf globe candytuft, is a low-growing, perennial herb that belongs to the Globularia genus. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful for treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Globularia nana subsp. bellidifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
